## Summary

Describe the behavior changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manually tested affected Discord UI surfaces

## Privacy And Compatibility

- [ ] No network requests, telemetry, or token access added
- [ ] Invisible users are not represented as detectable
- [ ] Screenshots and logs contain no personal Discord data
